hooks.prompt:
Analyze the assistant's last response. If stop_hook_active is true, return {"ok": true}.

CHECK 1 — GENERATION TASK:
Was this a GENERATION task? Generation = code/script written, text content produced, AI prompt generated, JSON/config created, plan via ExitPlanMode. NOT generation = answering questions, running commands, explanations, file reads, search results, status reports, conversational replies.
If GENERATION task AND response does NOT contain 'CRITIC PHASE' or 'Critic pass:' → return {"ok": false, "reason": "Generation without critic. Use Skill tool: Skill('output-critic') in the SAME response before final output — do NOT wait for Stop hook. Apply: score Completeness/Clarity/Goal alignment/Edge cases (1-5), gaps ≤3, improved v2. Mark with CRITIC PHASE header."}.

CHECK 2 — SEARCH VAULT FIRST:
Look at ALL tool_use calls made in this assistant turn. If ANY tools were used (other than only Read on MEMORY.md/settings.json, or only Bash for a single quick command like git status) AND the task involves project work (content, SEO, SMM, translations, WordPress, n8n, Instagram, architecture, analysis, any Studiokook or AiGeneration work) AND the first tool_use was NOT ghost-sessions deep_search, mcp__obsidian, Bash(ghost search *), or Bash(qmd *) AND the MEMORY.md context does NOT contain an AUTOSEARCH section → return {"ok": false, "reason": "Prompt hook condition was not met: Project task without vault search. FIRST tool must be ghost-sessions deep_search or mcp__obsidian before doing any project work. Vault contains past decisions, strategies, and patterns — always check before acting."}.

If neither check fails, return {"ok": true}.
